positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical neo-vintage celestial mandala design featuring entwined mythical flora (e.g., glowing moonpetals, iridescent ferns) and subtle astral elements (comet trails, zodiac constellations). The central motif should be a stylized woodland creature (e.g., a graceful fox or owl) integrated seamlessly into the floral pattern. Use a high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, luminous teal, burnished gold, and creamy ivory. The composition must be perfectly centered, designed as a circular repeating motif suitable for apparel printing. Style: Intricate linework, Art Nouveau meets Scientific Illustration, clean silhouettes, high contrast engraving style. Volumetric and crisp.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low resolution, text, signature, logo, watermark, artifact, noise, grain, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, boring, monochrome, childish, oversaturated
